title: Company’s disclosure of information about a debt owed is not covered under exemption to consent
summary: An individual complained that an organization disclosed his personal information, specifically information about a debt, to another organization on two occasions without his consent. Information about a debt owed by an identifiable individual constitutes personal information and is sensitive. It may only be disclosed by an organization wi...
